_metadata.description: Therapeutic dosing ranges for clinical efficacy validation
_metadata.purpose: Provide clinical therapeutic dosing ranges for BOTANICAL and COLLAGEN ingredients (the only classes the v4 botanical_profile/collagen_profile dose adapters consume). Non-botanical bioactives live in rda_optimal_uls.json.
_metadata.data_source: Clinical research, meta-analyses, standard therapeutic guidelines

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Mood support, sleep aid, serotonin precursor
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Do not combine with prescription antidepressants (SSRIs, MAOIs). May cause nausea at higher doses.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Adaptogen for stress, thyroid support, sleep
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Long-term safety of very high doses not established. Use caution with thyroid medications.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Cognitive function, memory, anxiety reduction
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standardized to 20-55% bacosides. May cause GI upset in some.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Blood sugar regulation, antimicrobial, lipid support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Can interact with many medications via CYP450 enzyme inhibition. Consult doctor.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, joint health
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: High doses may cause GI upset. Enhanced formulations (with piperine, phospholipids) greatly increase bioavailability.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Hormone balance, estrogen metabolism
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: May cause headaches or dark urine. Start with a lower dose.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Relaxation, stress reduction, sleep support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Generally recognized as safe (GRAS). High doses may cause brief tingling or shortness of breath.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Joint health, osteoarthritis support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: May affect blood sugar; monitor if diabetic. Shellfish allergen warning.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Joint lubrication, skin hydration
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Generally well-tolerated. Low molecular weight may be better absorbed.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Relaxation, focus, caffeine synergy
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Exceptionally safe. No known toxicity.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Eye health, macular pigment support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Fat-soluble; take with food. Often paired with zeaxanthin.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Sleep regulation, jet lag
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Lower doses (0.5-1mg) are often more effective for sleep regulation. Higher doses may cause morning grogginess.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Joint health, anti-inflammatory, skin/hair/nails
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Start with a lower dose to minimize potential detox symptoms. Generally very safe.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Glutathione precursor, respiratory health, detox support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: May interact with nitroglycerin and ACE inhibitors. Rare reports of histamine release.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Gut microbiome support, immune function
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Strain-specific effects are critical. High doses may cause initial bloating. Immunocompromised individuals should consult a doctor.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, mast cell stabilization
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Often paired with bromelain to enhance absorption. May interact with some antibiotics.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Antioxidant, longevity, cardiovascular support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Fat-soluble; take with food. High purity trans-resveratrol is preferred.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Adaptogen for stress and fatigue, cognitive enhancement
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standardized to 3% rosavins and 1% salidroside. May be stimulating for some; avoid late in the day.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Prostate health (BPH), hair loss support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standardized to 85-95% fatty acids. Doses above 320mg show no additional benefit in studies.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Mood support (mild to moderate depression)
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: **Major Interaction Risk:** Induces CYP450 enzymes. Interacts with antidepressants, birth control, blood thinners, and many others. Contraindicated with many medications.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Enhanced bioavailability CoQ10 for energy and heart health
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Considered 2-4x more bioavailable than ubiquinone. Preferred form for those over 40 or with absorption issues.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Sleep aid, relaxation
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standardized to 0.8-1% valerenic acid. May cause drowsiness. Not for long-term continuous use.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Skin/hair/nail (2.5 g+) and joint/bone (5-10 g) health; hydrolyzed Type I & III peptides incl. marine
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Generally very safe. Skin benefit validated from 2.5 g (Verisol); joint/bone 5-10 g. Bioavailability varies with form.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Knee osteoarthritis / joint; undenatured (native) Type II, oral-tolerance mechanism (low mg dose, NOT the hydrolyzed-peptide gram range)
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standard single validated dose 40 mg/day. Do NOT conflate with hydrolyzed Type II (BioCell).

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Joint OA + skin; hydrolyzed Type II + hyaluronic acid + chondroitin (chicken sternal cartilage)
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: 500 mg validated for skin, 2000 mg for OA.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Connective-tissue / collagen synthesis; denatured collagen with LOWER bioavailability than hydrolyzed peptides
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Mechanistic (collagen-synthesis-marker) evidence; intact denatured collagen, less bioavailable than pre-cleaved peptides.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Knee osteoarthritis / joint; collagen + glycosaminoglycans
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Single validated dose 500 mg/day; pain and stiffness are the validated endpoints.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Cognitive enhancement, memory, sleep quality
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: May cause drowsiness. Specific form designed to cross blood-brain barrier. Doses are for elemental magnesium.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: NAD+ precursor, anti-aging, cellular energy support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Relatively new supplement. Short-term human trials suggest good tolerability. Long-term effects are still under investigation.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Cognitive function, neuroplasticity, nerve growth factor
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Generally well-tolerated. Extract concentration varies significantly between products.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Mitochondrial biogenesis, cognitive function, cellular energy
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Clinical trials use 20-21.5mg/day. Higher doses not well studied. Often combined with CoQ10 for synergy.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Cognitive function, memory, cortisol reduction, athletic recovery
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standard dose is 100mg 3x daily. Soy and sunflower-derived forms available. May affect blood thinners.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Cognitive function, circulation, memory, tinnitus
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: EGb 761 is standardized extract used in clinical trials. Doses >240mg may increase bleeding risk. Avoid with blood thinners.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Antioxidant, skin health, eye health, exercise recovery, anti-inflammatory
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Fat-soluble carotenoid. Take with food. High doses may cause orange/red skin tint. Safe up to 24mg/day in studies.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Immune support, blood sugar regulation, anti-inflammatory, lipid support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Active compound is thymoquinone. May lower blood pressure and blood sugar. Caution with anticoagulants.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Energy, libido, hormonal balance, adaptogenic stress support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Studies use 1.5-3g daily for 6-16 weeks. Does not directly affect hormone levels. Different colors (red, black, yellow) may have different effects.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Liver support, hepatoprotective, detoxification, antioxidant
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Standard dose is 140mg 2-3x daily. Phospholipid-bound forms (phytosome) have better bioavailability. Safe for long-term use.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Mood support, depression, joint health, liver function, methylation support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Take on empty stomach. Enteric-coated preferred. AVOID with bipolar disorder (may trigger mania). May interact with antidepressants.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Athletic performance, energy, respiratory function, immune support
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Militaris strain more sustainable than wild sinensis. CS-4 is cultured mycelium. Take before exercise for performance benefits.

therapeutic_dosing.common_use: Immune modulation, sleep support, stress reduction, adaptogenic
therapeutic_dosing.upper_limit_notes: Best taken in evening for sleep benefits. Dual-extraction (water + alcohol) captures more compounds. May affect blood clotting.
